Class DRCrosstab

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.crosstab.DRCrosstab
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRICrosstab, Serializable
public class DRCrosstab extends DRDimensionComponent implements DRICrosstab

DRCrosstab class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
